notes: Fast-path per review-chain.md eligibility (polish, no auth, no new user data). F005 is a horizontal concern: F001/F002/F003 build stages consume its helper. Ship the helper FIRST (this stage's design output pins dimensions to the KPI tile / chart / row / card containers so no layout shift happens when data lands).
review_criteria: Skeleton dimensions pinned to container, not content (avoids layout shift)
Skeleton uses only --panel + a slightly-lighter shade -- no new palette
Error state distinct from empty state (different left-border colour)
Retry button labelled 'Try again' per Brand copy
